paired_card.line: Quality travels when the workflow does.

copy: One line held taut above the clouds, balance all the way across. Quality travels when the workflow does.
alt: A slackliner performs an extreme stunt, suspended upside down on a tightrope above a thick layer of clouds, with a dramatic mountain landscape behind.
alt_product: moodcase project view showing the slackline-above-clouds shot as it travels through the workflow.
